glosses.ja: 酔っぱらい; 酒飲み

sentences.target: On évite l'ivrogne près du métro.

translations.fr: On évite l'ivrogne près du métro.
translations.en: We avoid the drunk near the subway.
translations.es: Evitamos al borracho cerca del metro.
translations.de: Wir meiden den Betrunkenen in der Nähe der U-Bahn.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们避开地铁附近的醉汉。
translations.yue: 我哋喺地鐵附近避開嗰個醉酒佬。
translations.pt: Evitamos o bêbado perto do metrô.
translations.he: אנחנו נמנעים מהשיכור ליד הרכבת התחתית.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tránh người say rượu gần ga tàu điện ngầm.
translations.ar: نحن نتجنب السكير بالقرب من المترو.
translations.nl: We mijden de dronkaard bij de metro.
translations.hu: Kerüljük a részeget a metró közelében.
translations.hi: हम मेट्रो के पास उस नशे में धुत आदमी से बचते हैं.
translations.el: Αποφεύγουμε τον μεθυσμένο κοντά στο μετρό.
translations.nb: Vi unngår den fulle ved T-banen.
translations.id: Kami menghindari orang mabuk di dekat stasiun metro.
translations.sv: Vi undviker den berusade vid tunnelbanan.
translations.da: Vi undgår den berusede ved metroen.
translations.ja: 私たちは地下鉄の近くの酔っ払いを避ける。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun (3rd person singular) used colloquially for 'we'; subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Common noun meaning 'drunkard'; preceded by elided definite article 'l'' (le/la) marking definiteness; direct object of 'évite'.
Adverb used in the fixed prepositional phrase 'près de' indicating proximity; modifies the locative complement.
Contraction of the preposition 'de' and the definite article 'le'; introduces the noun 'métro' after 'près'.
Common noun; object of the contracted preposition 'du' forming the locative phrase.

sentences.target: Tu connais cette ivrogne du quartier.

translations.fr: Tu connais cette ivrogne du quartier.
translations.en: Do you know that drunk from the neighborhood?
translations.es: Conoces a esa borracha del barrio.
translations.de: Du kennst die Betrunkene aus der Nachbarschaft.
translations.ko: 너는 동네의 그 술 취한 여자를 알고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 你认识社区里的那位女酒鬼。
translations.ru: Ты знаешь ту пьяную женщину из района.
translations.pt: Você conhece aquela bêbada do bairro.
translations.vi: Bạn biết người phụ nữ say rượu trong khu phố đó.
translations.ar: أنت تعرف تلك المرأة السكرى من الحي.
translations.nl: Je kent die dronken vrouw uit de buurt.
translations.uk: Ти знаєш ту п’яну жінку з району.
translations.hu: Ismered azt a részeg nőt a környékről.
translations.hi: तुम उस मोहल्ले की उस नशे में धुत औरत को जानते हो.
translations.pl: Znasz tę pijaną kobietę z okolicy.
translations.el: Ξέρεις εκείνη τη μεθυσμένη από τη γειτονιά.
translations.nb: Du kjenner den fulle kvinnen fra nabolaget.
translations.id: Kamu mengenal perempuan mabuk itu dari lingkungan.
translations.sv: Du känner den berusade kvinnan från kvarteret.
translations.ro: O cunoști pe bețiva din cartier.
translations.cs: Znáš tu opilou ženu ze sousedství.
translations.da: Du kender den berusede kvinde fra kvarteret.
translations.ja: あなたは近所のその酔っ払った女性を知っている。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'connais'.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes a direct object.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'ivrogne' and marks deixis.
Common noun; here refers to a woman (inferred by 'cette'); direct object of 'connais'.
Contraction of 'de' + 'le'; introduces the genitive/locative complement 'quartier'.
Common noun; complement of 'du' specifying origin/association ('du quartier').

translations.en: She calls her uncle a drunk.
translations.es: Ella llama a su tío borracho.
translations.de: Sie nennt ihren Onkel einen Säufer.
translations.pt: Ela chama o tio dela de bêbado.
translations.vi: Cô ấy gọi chú của mình là đồ say rượu.
translations.nl: Ze noemt haar oom een dronkaard.
translations.hi: वह अपने चाचा को शराबी कहती है.
translations.nb: Hun kaller onkelen sin for fyllik.
translations.sv: Hon kallar sin farbror för fyllo.
translations.da: Hun kalder sin onkel for en fulderik.
translations.ja: 彼女はおじさんを酔っ払いと呼ぶ。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular feminine subject pronoun; subject of 'traite'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object and a 'de' complement ('traiter X de Y').
Possessive determiner, 3rd person; agrees with the noun (masculine singular 'oncle'), not with possessor's gender; modifies 'oncle'.
Common noun; direct object of 'traite' in the construction 'traiter quelqu'un de ...'.
Noun 'ivrogne' preceded by elided preposition 'd'' (de); predicate nominal complement in 'traiter X de Y' indicating what she calls him.

sentences.target: Ils guident l'ivrogne vers la sortie.

translations.fr: Ils guident l'ivrogne vers la sortie.
translations.en: They're guiding the drunk toward the exit.
translations.es: Guían al borracho hacia la salida.
translations.de: Sie führen den Betrunkenen zum Ausgang.
translations.yue: 佢哋扶住嗰個醉酒佬去出口。
translations.pt: Eles levam o bêbado até a saída.
translations.he: הם מובילים את השיכור אל היציאה.
translations.vi: Họ dẫn người say rượu về phía lối ra.
translations.nl: Ze leiden de dronkaard naar de uitgang.
translations.hi: वे उस नशे में धुत व्यक्ति को निकास की ओर ले जाते हैं.
translations.el: Οδηγούν τον μεθυσμένο προς την έξοδο.
translations.nb: De leder den fulle mot utgangen.
translations.id: Mereka menuntun orang mabuk itu ke arah pintu keluar.
translations.sv: De leder den berusade mot utgången.
translations.ro: Îl conduc pe bețiv spre ieșire.
translations.da: De fører den berusede mod udgangen.
translations.ja: 彼らは酔っ払いを出口へ案内する。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun; subject of 'guident'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural; takes a direct object and a directional complement.
Common noun with elided definite article 'l''; direct object of 'guident'.
Simple preposition indicating direction; introduces the complement 'la sortie'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'sortie'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'vers', marking destination.
